verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a GPI-anchored surface protein with documented outer-leaflet localization on sperm cells. However, expression is restricted to the male germline (spermatids/sperm) and is absent from somatic tissues. Germline-restricted surface display with a GPI anchor qualifies as contextual/tissue_restricted_surface, not yes. The narrow developmental lineage gating is the key criterion, not the anchor type.
